---
name: Add a Project to the Ecosystem Registry
about: Suggest a new tool, library, or plugin to be added to the Protobuf Ecosystem directory.
title: 'Ecosystem: Add [Project Name]'
labels: 'ecosystem, enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

### Project Name
<!-- The name of the project as you'd like it to appear in the registry -->


### GitHub Repository URL
<!-- e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo -->


### Category
<!-- Select one: Tools, Plugins, or Libraries -->


### Short Description
<!-- 1-2 sentences explaining what the project does and how it helps the Protobuf/gRPC community -->


### Project Website
<!-- If different from the GitHub repository URL -->


### Programming Languages
<!-- e.g., Go, Rust, Java, TypeScript, Agnostic -->
